header.note: The source node in most cases contains the sample message as written by the developer. If it looks like a dot-delimitted string such as "form.label.firstname", then the developer has not provided a default message.

trans-unit.source: Segment Group identifier "%identifier%" is not unique
trans-unit.target: El identificador del grupo de segmentos "%identifier%" no es único

trans-unit.source: Segment Group identifier "{{ identifier }}" is not unique
trans-unit.target: El identificador del grupo de segmentos "{{ identifier }}" no es único
El identificador de segmentos "%identifier%" no es único

trans-unit.source: Segment identifier "{{ identifier }}" is not unique
trans-unit.target: El identificador de segmentos "{{ identifier }}" no es único

trans-unit.source: User ID=%userId% is already assigned to %segment% segment.
trans-unit.target: El usuario con ID=%userId% ya está asignado al segmento %segment%.
